personal.name: Aadith Yadav Govindarajan
personal.subheading: Mechanical Engineering undergrad @ NUS '29 | Ferdinand-Braun-Institut Summer Internship | Chair of IEEE-NUS Student Branch
personal.description: Mechanical Engineering and Material Science & Engineering student at NUS. Burning interest in aerospace and semiconductor technology

projects.title: ASIC for  Bose-Chaudhuri-Hocquenghem Correction Code (15,7,2)
projects.description: Designed an ASIC in the 130nm CMOS technology node for BCH error correction code, achieving a 15-bit (8-bit message, 7-bit checksum) communication with up to 2-bit error correction. The design was implemented using Verilog and synthesized with Synopsys Design Compiler.

projects.title: Automated design of a 4-bit R2R DAC
projects.description: Automated the analog design of a 4-bit R2R DAC with ALIGN on the SKY130 PDK using Python Jupyter notebook. Submitted to IEEE SSCS OSE Code-a-Chip Contest 2025 for ISSCC26

projects.title: Robust 1-bit 10T SRAM on CMOS 45nm technology node
projects.description: As a part of the IEEE SSCS Student Circuit Contest 2025, designed and verified a robust 1-bit 10T SRAM cell with read and write access functionalities on CMOS 45nm technology node using LTspice and Verilog.

projects.title: Aadith Panels
projects.description: A social enterprise founded by myself focused on sustainable energy solutions by providing solar panel system designs to small power-intensive firms & organisations.

projects.title: E-Library GUI System
projects.description: Built an E-Library system for Radha-Govinda Temple to manage and keep track of their theological book inventory and lending system.

projects.title: E-Bike Conversion
projects.description: Converted mechanical bicycle to an electric bicycle with a 250W motor, 24V battery and a custom PCB for control systems.

experience.description: Research internship in photoluminescence characterisation of semiconductor materials. Developed experimental setup for photoluminescence measurements and performed data analysis using Python & Simulink to extract material properties.

Enterprise solution to ennsure employee communications are compliant with company policies and regulatory requirements. Developed a Chrome extension to monitor and analyze employee communications in real-time, leveraging LLMs for natural language processing and compliance checks.
Collaborated on email automation project with Next.js and delivered ERP related projects with Python to save time in workflow.

comment.description: Founded and led a 7 member social enterprise, advancing sustainable energy solutions by providing innovative solar panel system designs to small power-intensive trusts and organisations. Produced nearly 24kW power, saving costs (~€ 2000 / yr).

experience.description: Focused on design of compressor blade with modal analysis using ANSYS, CAD modelling for turbine fan blade and unit-testing for python codebase.

publications.title: Fractional Calculus Application in Modelling Non-linear Sloshing
